channel.title: Delay generating css
channel.description:
<!--
Are you asking about "how to solve a specific issue/error/problem in your Frontity project"?
If so, please check this guide on the information we suggest you include in your topic so the community (and the Frontity team) can provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible
https://community.frontity.org/t/about-the-dev-talk-questions-category/2/3
The info you may provide: - Description of your issue - Specific errors you’re getting in the terminal or in the browser’s console - A repository with the code of your project - A deployed version of your site - The URL of your WP REST API
-->
When my site loads the first time, during a few miliseconds, the site is broke, without css, after that the site looks fine. How Can I avoid this behaviour? - I'm using cx and css from emotion, and algo a them provider for the grid system called https://www.npmjs.com/package/styled-bootstrap-grid - Deploy version: https://esmuybrutal.puigmar.me/

item.title: Delay generating css
item.dc:creator: santoshdevnath15
item.description:
hi @ferran.puigmar, first of all welcome to the Frontity Community, hope you are enjoying it.

Frontity loads Styled CSS very smoothly and takes time to load basic CSS.

Previously I also tried bootstrap and Material UI, but with both UI frameworks, it loads the CSS after a few milliseconds.

Then I tried Chakra-UI and finally, that worked properly. Here is the working example of the site - BabaCric

Tip

Material UI also provides styled CSS, but I did not try it, you can check that.

Read full topic

item.title: Delay generating css
item.dc:creator: ferran.puigmar
item.description:
When my site loads the first time, during a few miliseconds, the site is broke, without css, after that the site looks fine. How Can I avoid this behaviour?

  • I’m using cx and css from emotion, and algo a them provider for the grid system called https://www.npmjs.com/package/styled-bootstrap-grid
  • Deploy version: https://esmuybrutal.puigmar.me/

Read full topic
